meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for Marketing Growth
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate your freelance business growth with this intermediate checklist.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree; you need an automated engine. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can transform your technical documentation into high-converting landing pages, social content, and email sequences. This workflow turns your code output into a perpetual marketing machine, allowing you to scale without manual effort.
content.intro:
The blank page is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You spend eighty percent of your week shipping high-performance code, only to let your lead pipeline wither because you lack the time—or the inclination—to write marketing copy. You are a builder, not a copywriter, yet the market demands a constant stream of content to justify your rates.

Relief is here. By leveraging Claude Code as your autonomous marketing engine, you can bridge the gap between technical output and commercial visibility. We are moving beyond manual blogging and into the era of programmatic authority, where your development environment works as hard as you do to secure your next high-ticket contract.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition Engine
steps.description: Convert your technical features into client-centric benefits by analyzing your recent commit history to extract unique selling points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my recent codebase changes. Identify the top 3 technical challenges solved and translate them into benefits a non-technical stakeholder would pay to have solved.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src --goal 'Extract the top 3 business benefits from this project for a marketing landing page.'

steps.title: Automate Content Repurposing
steps.description: Turn your README files into a series of LinkedIn posts to build authority without writing from scratch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Take the README.md and generate 5 LinkedIn post hooks that focus on pain points, ending with a call to action to hire me for similar implementations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read README.md --goal 'Generate 5 LinkedIn posts based on this documentation.'

steps.title: Construct the Outreach Sequence
steps.description: Use your technical expertise to create hyper-personalized cold outreach emails based on the specific technologies you excel at.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a cold outreach email template for a potential client in the fintech space, highlighting my specific experience with the tech stack identified in my repo.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./package.json --goal 'Draft a cold email template targeting fintech CTOs based on my project dependencies.'

steps.title: Build a Lead-Gen Landing Page
steps.description: Quickly generate the structure and copy for a service page that showcases your technical authority.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a high-converting landing page structure for my freelance dev services. Include an FAQ section based on the common bugs I've fixed in this repo.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write ./landing-page.html --goal 'Create a landing page structure using Tailwind CSS based on the project's technical strengths.'

steps.title: Optimize for SEO Authority
steps.description: Inject technical metadata and keywords into your site structure to ensure your projects are discoverable by high-intent clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the top 5 long-tail keywords for a freelance developer specializing in my tech stack and suggest meta tags for my portfolio site.
steps.claude_code_command: claude read ./src --goal 'Suggest SEO meta tags and a keyword-rich description for my freelance portfolio site.'

pro_tips: Always pass your 'git log' to Claude Code to let it analyze your actual workflow speed—clients love data-backed efficiency claims.
Use Antigravity to create a 'marketing-config.json' file in your projects so Claude always knows your brand voice and target audience.
Turn your 'TODO' comments into a 'Features to Build' marketing blog series; it shows potential clients your roadmap and vision.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests, then publish the 'testing report' as a case study for quality assurance—clients trust verified code.
Never post raw AI output; use Claude to generate the draft, then manually rewrite the intro and outro to ensure your unique human perspective shines through.
content.next_steps: Set up a recurring weekly cron job to run these Claude Code commands against your active repos to keep your marketing content updated automatically.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your code sit in silence. Start building the brand that brings the clients to you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
